column2: Questions
column3: Reference SPARQL Query

column2: "Which plant has extracts containing compounds that demonstrated inhibition rates above 50% against Trypanosoma cruzi and are above 800 Da in mass? Provide the lab extracts."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?plant ?labExtract
  WHERE {
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?mass .
      FILTER(?mass > 800)
      ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?bioAssayResult .
      ?bioAssayResult ns2:inhibition_percentage ?inhibition .
      FILTER(?inhibition > 50)
      ?bioAssayResult ns2:target_id <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL368> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:submitted_taxon ?plant .
  }

column2: "Filter the pos ionization mode features of the Melochia umbellata taxon annotated as [M+H]+ by SIRIUS to keep the ones for which a feature in neg ionization mode is detected with the same retention time (+/- 3 seconds) and a mass corresponding to the [M-H]- SIRIUS adduct (+/- 5ppm). Provide the features and retention time."
"How unique InChIKey2D are among the structural annotations?"

"What are the retention times and molecular masses of compounds identified in the negative ionization mode LCMS analysis from  Lovoa trichilioides extracts, and what are the CANOPUS chemical class annotations for those features?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
  PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  SELECT ?retentionTime ?molecularMass ?canopusClass
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q8008828 .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysisNeg .
      ?lcmsAnalysisNeg a ns1:LCMSAnalysisNeg .
      ?lcmsAnalysisNeg ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_retention_time ?retentionTime .
      ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?molecularMass .
      ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?canopusAnnotation .
      ?canopusAnnotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class ?canopusClass .
  }

column2: "What are the retention times and adduct types of LCMS features from Desmodium heterophyllum annotated by SIRIUS with a cosmic score greater than 0.4??"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?retentionTime ?adduct
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_retention_time ?retentionTime .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_cosmic_score ?cosmicScore .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_adduct ?adduct .
      FILTER(?cosmicScore > 0.4)
  }

column2: "What are the LCMS features that have feature areas greater than 1,000,000 in positive ionization mode ? Sort by decreasing feature area value."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?feature
  WHERE {
      ?analysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_feature_area ?area .
      FILTER(?area > 1000000)
  } ORDER BY DESC(?area)

column2: "Can you provide the SMILES notation and the Wikidata IDs for the compound with the highest precusor ion mass in the MS2 spectra from extracts of Lovoa trichilioides by looking at SIRIUS annotations?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?smiles ?wd_id
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8008828> .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
    ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
    ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_smiles ?smiles ;
                    ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
    ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?mass .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?mass)
LIMIT 1

column2: "Retrieve the most frequent Spec2Vec peaks and losses characterizing the MS2 spectra from the lab extracts of Tabernaemontana coffeoides."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
  PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  SELECT ?spec2vecPeak ?spec2vecLoss (COUNT(?spec2vecPeak) AS ?peakFrequency) (COUNT(?spec2vecLoss) AS ?lossFrequency)
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q15376858 .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_spec2vec_doc ?spec2vecDoc .
      ?spec2vecDoc ns1:has_spec2vec_peak ?spec2vecPeak .
      ?spec2vecDoc ns1:has_spec2vec_loss ?spec2vecLoss .
  } GROUP BY ?spec2vecPeak ?spec2vecLoss 
 ORDER BY DESC(?peakFrequency) DESC(?lossFrequency)
 LIMIT 1

column2: "What are the LC-MS features that have GNPS library analogs annotation in Tabernaemontana coffeoides? Provide the features."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?feature
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:fast_search_gnpslibrary_analog ?analog .
  }

column2: "For features from the Melochia umbellata taxon in pos ionization mode with SIRIUS annotations, get the ones for which a feature in neg ionization mode with the same retention time (+/- 0.05 minutes) has the same SIRIUS annotation by comparing the InCHIKey 2D. Return the features, retention times, and InChIKey2D"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?featurePos ?retentionTime ?InChIkey2D
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q6813281 .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsPos .
    ?lcmsPos a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
    ?lcmsPos ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureListPos .
    ?featureListPos ns1:has_lcms_feature ?featurePos .
    ?featurePos ns1:has_retention_time ?retentionTime .
    ?featurePos ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotationPos .
    ?siriusAnnotationPos ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .

    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsNeg .
    ?lcmsNeg a ns1:LCMSAnalysisNeg .
    ?lcmsNeg ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureListNeg .
    ?featureListNeg ns1:has_lcms_feature ?featureNeg .
    ?featureNeg ns1:has_retention_time ?retentionTimeNeg .
    ?featureNeg ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotationNeg .
    ?siriusAnnotationNeg ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .

    FILTER (ABS(?retentionTime - ?retentionTimeNeg) <= 0.05)
}

column2: "List the lab extracts that have inhibition percentages above 50% at 2µg/mL against Trypanosoma brucei rhodesiense ."
"Retrieve the Spec2Vec documents associated with MS2 spectra from the lab extracts of Tabernaemontana coffeoides"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?spec2vecDoc
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysis .
      ?lcmsAnalysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_spec2vec_doc ?spec2vecDoc .
  }

column2: "Which extracts have features (pos ionization mode) annotated as the class, aspidosperma-type alkaloids, by CANOPUS with a probability score above 0.5, ordered by the decreasing count of features as aspidosperma-type alkaloids? Group by extract."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

SELECT ?labExtract (COUNT(?feature) AS ?featureCount)
WHERE {
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/npc_Aspidosperma_type> .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class_prob ?probability .
    FILTER(?probability > 0.5)
}
GROUP BY ?labExtract
ORDER BY DESC(?featureCount)

column2: "Which ISDB annotations have consistency scores above 0.7 and taxonomic scores above 0.5 for LCMS features from Tabernaemontana coffeoides? Provide annotations."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?Annotation
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_isdb_annotation ?Annotation .
      ?Annotation ns1:has_consistency_score ?consistencyScore .
      ?Annotation ns1:has_taxo_score ?taxoScore .
      FILTER(?consistencyScore > 0.7 && ?taxoScore > 0.5)
  }

column2: "What are the taxons, lab process and label (if one exists) for each sample? Sort by sample and then lab process"
"What are the mass spectrometry features detected only in the plant Rumex nepalensis?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
  PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  SELECT ?feature
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q11041204 .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
  }

column2: "How many distinct Wikidata identifiers (WD IDs) have the same metabolite annotation (considering only the plannar structure)?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?wd_id) AS ?distinct_wd_ids)
  WHERE {
      ?annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
      ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?InChIkey .
      ?InChIkey ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
  }

column2: "List the LC-MS features that have a chemical class annotation by CANOPUS and have a retention time between 5-7 minutes." "
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?feature
  WHERE {
      ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation  .
      ?feature ns1:has_retention_time ?retention_time .
      ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class ?chemicalClass  .
  FILTER(?retentionTime >= 5 && ?retentionTime <= 7) }

column2: "Retrieve the lab extracts that have more than 2,000 features detected."
"What is the distribution of chemical superclasses in the LCMS features annotated by CANOPUS identified from Desmodium heterophyllum extracts?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?superclass (COUNT(?superclass) AS ?count)
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q10770714 .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_superclass ?superclass .
}
GROUP BY ?superclass

column2: "Retrieve the top-10 lab extracts with the most unique features detected (minimum feature area intensity of 500,000."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
SELECT ?labExtract (COUNT(DISTINCT ?feature) AS ?uniqueFeatures)
WHERE {
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_feature_area ?featureArea .
    FILTER(?featureArea >= 500000)
}
GROUP BY ?labExtract
ORDER BY DESC(?uniqueFeatures)
LIMIT 10

column2: "List the top 3 lab extracts with the highest number of unique compounds annotated by CANOPUS with a probability greater than 0.9."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

SELECT ?labExtract (COUNT(DISTINCT ?compound) AS ?uniqueCompounds)
WHERE {
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
    ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class ?compound .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class_prob ?probability .
    FILTER(?probability > 0.9)
}
GROUP BY ?labExtract
ORDER BY DESC(?uniqueCompounds)
LIMIT 3

column2: "What are the LCMS features with the highest area annotated as alkaloids by CANOPUS in Tabernaemontana coffeoides extracts?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?feature ?featureArea
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_feature_area ?featureArea .
      ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/npc_Steroidal_alkaloids> .
  }
  ORDER BY DESC(?featureArea)
  LIMIT 1

column2: "Count the number of LCMS features in negative ionization mode"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT (COUNT(?feature) AS ?featureCount)
  WHERE {
      ?analysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisNeg .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
  }

column2: "What are the chemical structure ISDB annotations for Lovoa trichilioides ?"

PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?Annotation

      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .

column2: "Retrieve the Wikidata IDs of chemical entities from Desmodium heterophyllum that are annotated as rotenoids by CANOPUS and have ChEMBL assay results showing activity against Trypanosoma cruzi. Provide also the USIs to the corresponding MS/MS spectra."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?wd_id ?usi
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714> ;
                 ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation ;
             ns1:has_usi ?usi .
    ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/npc_Rotenoids> .
 ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?assayResult .
  ?assayResult ns2:target_id <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL368> .
 ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
  ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
    ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
    ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
  }

column2: "Retrieve the retention times and parent masses of LCMS features annotated as Terpenoids by CANOPUS in Tabernaemontana coffeoides."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?retentionTime ?parentMass
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_pathway <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/npc_Terpenoids> .
      ?feature ns1:has_retention_time ?retentionTime .
      ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?parentMass .
  }

column2: "Which compounds from Desmodium heterophyllum extracts have annotations from both ISDB and SIRIUS, and what are their molecular masses?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?compound ?mass
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q10770714 .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_isdb_annotation ?isdbAnnotation .
    ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
    ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?mass .
    ?isdbAnnotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?compound .
    ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?compound .
}

column2: "What are the most frequent adducts of LCMS features annotated by SIRIUS detected in positive ionization mode from Tabernaemontana coffeoides?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?adduct (COUNT(?adduct) AS ?frequency)
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysis .
      ?lcmsAnalysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
      ?lcmsAnalysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_adduct ?adduct .
  }
  GROUP BY ?adduct
  ORDER BY DESC(?frequency)

column2: "What are the Wikidata IDs of chemical entities that have ChEMBL activity against Trypanosoma cruzi target?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?wd_id
  WHERE {
      ?chemicalEntity ns2:has_chembl_id ?chemblChemical .
      ?chemblChemical ns2:has_chembl_activity ?assayResults .
      ?assayResults ns2:target_id <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL368> .
      ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
  }

column2: "How many features (pos ionization and neg ionization modes) have the same SIRIUS/CSI:FingerID and ISDB annotation by comparing the InCHIKey2D of the annotations?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT (COUNT(?feature) AS ?featureCount)
  WHERE {
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
      ?feature ns1:has_isdb_annotation ?isdbAnnotation .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
      ?isdbAnnotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
  }

column2: "How many features annotated as 'Tetraketide meroterpenoids' by CANOPUS are found for each submitted taxon and extract in database?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?submittedTaxon ?extract (COUNT(?feature) AS ?featureCount)
  WHERE {
      ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_class <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/npc_Tetraketide_meroterpenoids> .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?extract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?extract .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:submitted_taxon ?submittedTaxon .
  }
  GROUP BY ?submittedTaxon ?extract

column2: "What are the retention times, parent masses, and associated Spec2Vec peaks for features in the LC-MS analysis of the plant Rumex nepalensis in positive ion mode?"

  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11041204> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysis .
      ?lcmsAnalysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
      ?lcmsAnalysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_retention_time ?retention_time .
      ?feature ns1:has_parent_mass ?parent_mass .
      ?feature ns1:has_spec2vec_doc ?spec2vecDoc .
      ?spec2vecDoc ns1:has_spec2vec_peak ?spec2vec_peak .
  }

column2: “What are the most frequent SIRIUS chemical structure annotations (planar structure) observed from the extracts belonging to Hibiscus syriacus?”
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?InChIkey2D (COUNT(?InChIkey2D) AS ?frequency)
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q157756> .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
    ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
}
GROUP BY ?InChIkey2D
ORDER BY DESC(?frequency)

column2: "Which molecules (represented by their InChIkey) have reported ChEMBL activity with activity type IC50 and activity values below 500 nM against Leishmania donovani target?"
"What are the SIRIUS structural annotations associated with the MS2 spectra from the lab extracts of Tabernaemontana coffeoides ?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?siriusAnnotation
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysis .
      ?lcmsAnalysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
      ?siriusAnnotation a ns1:SiriusStructureAnnotation .
  }

column2: "Which lab extracts from Melochia umbellata yield compounds that, when analyzed in positive ionization mode LCMS, have a retention time of less than 6 minutes and demonstrate an inhibition percentage greater than 70% in bioassay results? Provide lab extracts, retention times and inhibition percentage."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?labExtract ?retentionTime ?inhibitionPercentage
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q6813281 .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
    ?analysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
    ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
    ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_retention_time ?retentionTime .
    FILTER(?retentionTime < 6)
    ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?bioAssayResult .
    ?bioAssayResult ns2:inhibition_percentage ?inhibitionPercentage .
    FILTER(?inhibitionPercentage > 70)
}

column2: "Provide the wikidata ids of the chemical entities annotated by SIRIUS for Tabernaemontana coffeoides seeds extract taxon obtained in positive mode which are also reported in the Tabernaemontana genus in Wikidata."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?wd_id
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysis .
    ?lcmsAnalysis a ns1:LCMSAnalysisPos .
    ?lcmsAnalysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
    ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
    ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
    ?annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?inchiKey2D .
    ?inchiKey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
    ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
}

column2: "What is the highest inhibition percentage recorded for compounds observed in Rauvolfia vomitoria extract?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
  PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

  SELECT ?inhibition_percentage
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q5225969 .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?bioAssayResult .
      ?bioAssayResult ns2:inhibition_percentage ?inhibition_percentage .
  }
  ORDER BY DESC(?inhibition_percentage)
  LIMIT 1

column2: "List the bioassay results at 10µg/mL against T.cruzi for lab extracts of Tabernaemontana coffeoides."

PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?labExtract ?bioAssayResult
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id wd:Q15376858 .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?bioAssayResult .
    ?bioAssayResult a ns2:Tcruzi10ugml .
}

column2: "For the LC-MS feature observed in the extracts of Tabernaemontana coffeoides, retrieve those that are annotated with a NPCPathways with CANOPUS."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?feature
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .

      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_canopus_npc_pathway ?npcPathway .

column2: "List the tissue types used to produce the lab extracts of Tabernaemontana coffeoides. Provide the tissue types and lab extracts. "
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?tissue ?labExtract
WHERE {
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
    ?rawMaterial ns2:has_tissue ?tissue .
}

column2: "Retrieve the mass differences and cosine similarity scores for spectral pairs involving MS2 spectra from Desmodium heterophyllum."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?mass_difference ?cosine
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?lcmsAnalysis .
      ?lcmsAnalysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?spectralPair ns1:has_member ?feature .
      ?spectralPair ns1:has_mass_difference ?mass_difference .
      ?spectralPair ns1:has_cosine ?cosine .
  }

column2: "Retrieve the top 5 tissues used to produce lab extracts that contain compounds with inhibition activity greater than 70% against Leishmania donovani target at 10 µg/mL"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

SELECT ?tissue (COUNT(?labExtract) AS ?count)
WHERE {
    ?labExtract ns2:has_bioassay_results ?bioAssayResult .
    ?bioAssayResult ns2:inhibition_percentage ?inhibitionPercentage ;
                    ns2:target_id <https://www.ebi.ac.uk/chembl/target_report_card/CHEMBL367> .
    FILTER(?inhibitionPercentage > 70)
    ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract ;
                 ns2:has_tissue ?tissue .
}
GROUP BY ?tissue
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 5

column2: "Retrieve the Wikidata IDs   of chemical entities classified as Terpenoids in the lab extracts of Tabernaemontana coffeoides."
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>

  SELECT ?wd_id
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?annotation .
      ?annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
      ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
      ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_npc_pathway <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/npc_Terpenoids> .
      ?chemicalEntity ns1:has_wd_id ?wd_id .
  }

column2: "What are the CANOPUS annotations for pairs of features from Desmodium heterophyllum extracts that share a cosine similarity score greater than 0.8? Provide the features, and annotations"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?feature1 ?feature2 ?annotation1 ?annotation2 
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10770714> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature1, ?feature2 .
      ?pair ns1:has_member ?feature1, ?feature2 .
      ?pair ns1:has_cosine ?cosine .
      FILTER(?cosine > 0.8)
      ?feature1 ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation1 .
      ?feature2 ns1:has_canopus_annotation ?annotation2 .
  }

column2: "Which ChEMBL documents cited in ChEMBL assay results involve compounds (identified by InChIKeys) that are also observed in SIRIUS structural annotations within lab extracts, and which lab extracts contain the highest number of these shared compounds?
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?chemblDocument ?labExtract (COUNT(?InChIkey2D) AS ?sharedCompoundCount)
  WHERE {
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?featureList .
      ?featureList ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .

      ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?chemicalEntity .
      ?chemicalEntity ns2:has_chembl_id ?chemblChemical .

      ?chemblChemical ns2:has_chembl_activity ?assayResult .
      ?assayResult ns2:stated_in_document ?chemblDocument .
  }
  GROUP BY ?chemblDocument ?labExtract
  ORDER BY DESC(?sharedCompoundCount)

column2:
“What are the ChEMBL targets
linked to ChEMBL assay results for chemicals sharing InChIKeys with SIRIUS structural annotations ?"
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?chembl_target
  WHERE {
      ?sirius_annotation ns1:has_InChIkey2D ?InChIkey2D .
      ?InChIkey2D ns1:is_InChIkey2D_of ?InChIkey .
      ?InChIkey ns2:has_chembl_id ?chembl_chemical .
      ?chembl_chemical ns2:has_chembl_activity ?chembl_assay_results .
      ?chembl_assay_results ns2:target_id ?chembl_target .
  }

column2: "What are SIRIUS structural annotations for LCMS features with cosmic scores above 0.3 associated with Tabernaemontana coffeoides? Report their ZODIAC scores. "
column3:
PREFIX ns1: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/kg/>
  PREFIX ns2: <https://enpkg.commons-lab.org/module/>

  SELECT ?cosmic_score ?zodiac_score
  WHERE {
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_wd_id <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15376858> .
      ?rawMaterial ns1:has_lab_process ?labExtract .
      ?labExtract ns1:has_LCMS ?analysis .
      ?analysis ns1:has_lcms_feature_list ?feature_list .
      ?feature_list ns1:has_lcms_feature ?feature .
      ?feature ns1:has_sirius_annotation ?siriusAnnotation .
      ?siriusAnnotation ns1:has_cosmic_score ?cosmic_score .
 FILTER (?cosmic_score > 0.3)   
                 ?siriusAnnotation    ns1:has_zodiac_score ?zodiac_score .
  }
